content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with NIFTY -1.10%, IT index crashing -4.82%, VIX up 3.44% to 19.23. Defensive rotation visible in FMCG (Nestle/HUL) and pharma, but overall risk-off tone. Book is 67% deployed with net session unrealized loss — deployment hysteresis applies, default on new entries is NO_ACTION unless setup is materially superior.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at -5.7%, CMP 76.88 vs SL 75.00. Thesis (strong Q4, HDFC Sec target 90) intact; PSU bank sector weak today but MAHABANK holding above SL. SL at 75 is the line — no modify needed, just hold and let it work or stop out. Cannot tighten SL meaningfully without immediate stop-out risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.8% with +1.66% today. Current SL 1011.65 is actually ABOVE CMP 1021.20 — that's an oddly placed SL that would trigger on any pullback. Loosening slightly to 1000 (below pivot 989.85 / day low 995) to give room while locking in breakeven+. Wait — cannot loosen SL. Keeping at 1011.65 means imminent stop-out risk on normal pullback. Reconsidering: HOLD is correct since SL cannot be loosened. Cancelling MODIFY — see position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Correction to above: SL cannot be loosened per rules. Current SL 1011.65 is tight (below CMP 1021); let price action decide. ICICI Sec target 1350, strong Q4 — thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "ETF hedge position -1.1%, well within SL 119. Gold defensive thesis intact with VIX rising and geopolitical risk elevated. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1395.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1412.94 (entry) equals CMP 1411.20 — essentially already at breakeven but will trigger on any drop. Tightening logic reversed — 1395 is BELOW current SL so this would be LOOSENING, not allowed. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Correction: current SL at entry 1412.94 is already at breakeven. CMP 1411.20 near SL — binary. Thesis of defensive FMCG leader post strong Q4 intact but broker targets cluster at 1400-1500 suggesting limited upside. Hold and let SL/target decide."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, CMP 1052.15 vs current SL 1035 (entry 1049.05). Stock hit 52W high 1079 today but faded. Q4 results April 27 — binary event 3 days out. Tightening SL from 1035 to 1040 to reduce pre-event risk while keeping room for normal volatility. Target unchanged at 1130."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, CMP 686.40 vs SL 678. Q4 results April 29 — binary event. Stock near top of analyst target band 587-687 so upside limited post-results. SL already tight at 678. Hold into event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.3%, CMP 2302 vs SL 2260. Stock down 2.72% today despite bullish sector read. Q4 April 30. SL gives ~1.8% more room. Thesis of FMCG defensive + rural recovery intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 400.45 vs SL 393. Near 52W high, holding well. Q4 May 15 — too far for early exit signal. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 near CMP 76.88. Binary — either thesis plays or stops out. No tightening without triggering."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1011.65 already tight — within 1% of CMP. Per rules cannot loosen. Locked in breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL at 119 gives adequate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 1412.94 = breakeven. CMP 1411 — already at risk of stop-out. Cannot loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 1035 to 1040 ahead of April 27 Q4 print to reduce binary event downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 678 already tight (~1.2% from CMP). Q4 April 29 binary. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 2260 gives ~1.8% room; stock under pressure but thesis intact into April 30 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 393 below session low. Position near 52W high, healthy. No change needed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL, ONESOURCE, EMCURE, HUDCO, GVT&D, NAVINFLUOR all showing momentum but most are extended/near 52W highs with event risk. HSCL +23% in 4 sessions is parabolic with Apr 27 earnings — sell-the-news risk. ONESOURCE has 70% promoter pledge red flag. GVT&D at P/E 97x is priced for perfection. PPLPHARMA 9.4x volume worth monitoring but Q3 loss and Apr 28 binary event keep it non-actionable. Will re-evaluate post-earnings for all these.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed, daily unrealized -0.34%, VIX rising, NIFTY -1.10%. Deployment hysteresis invoked — no new entries today. Multiple holdings (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR/NAVINFLUOR Apr 29-30, NESTLEIND post-result hangover) all have Q4 events in the next 6 trading days, creating clustered event risk. Priority is risk management, not new adds. Several SLs are already tight near entry which is good — but means any adverse tick could cascade stop-outs. Cash buffer 33% provides cushion. One MODIFY emitted (AUBANK) to tighten pre-event."
}
